'''Doldur''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-controlled [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]]. Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Eisen Kerioth]] considered it his personal territory and sponsored research of an antiblaster [[Ray shield/Legends|energy shield]].

{{Planet-stub}}
